---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, resource type, or tool
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

One or two sentences on the gap you hit.

## Why

What plan change today is missed, mis-classified, or under-explained? A
concrete example helps a lot.

## Suggested behavior

If you have a specific shape in mind (new tool, new field on
`ReviewSummary`, new resource type added to `HIGH_RISK_TYPES`,
new diff-aware check), describe it here.

## Out of scope reminder

This server is intentionally scoped to **plan review**. Wrapping the
`terraform` CLI, HCL static analysis, and Terraform Registry lookups are
out of scope. See [DESIGN.md](../../DESIGN.md) for the boundary.
